description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design is complemented with colourful straps and looks perfect when teamed with casuals.UpperThong straps comprised of colourful faux leather strips with heavy stitch detailing covering forefoot and midfoot for a snug Fit and great eye appealSoft lining for added styleFabric lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved pattern on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
